news.headline: Top 10 S&P 500 stocks may surge 50% by 2025, a report suggests.
Mecho releases EPDs for motorized shades, a first in the industry, showing commitment to sustainability.
news.summary: On December 11, 2024, in New York, Mecho, a top provider of commercial shading solutions, introduced Environmental Product Declarations (EPDs) for motorized shade systems, marking a pioneering move in the shading sector. This initiative highlights Mecho's dedication to sustainability efforts and transparency.

news.headline: Tambourine opens new LATAM HQ in Bogotá, Colombia, showing commitment to region's growth. #DigitalMarketing #Expansion
news.summary: On December 11, 2024, Tambourine, a renowned digital marketing technology company, inaugurated its new Latin America (LATAM) headquarters in Bogotá, Colombia. This move demonstrates Tambourine's commitment to catering to the growing market in the region.

news.headline: Bitdefender excels in 2024 MITRE Engenuity ATT&CK® Evaluations with outstanding alert accuracy, critical for security efficiency.
news.summary: In Bucharest, Romania and Santa Clara, California, Bitdefender revealed outstanding achievements in the 2024 MITRE Engenuity ATT&CK® Enterprise Evaluations.

news.headline: Cynet achieves 100% protection & detection in 2024 MITRE ATT&CK Evaluation with zero false positives. SMEs and MSPs benefit.
news.summary: A cybersecurity company based in Boston, Cynet, has made significant strides as the sole cybersecurity vendor in the 2024 MITRE ATT&CK Evaluation. They managed to achieve impressive results, including 100% protection and 100% detection visibility without making any configuration changes. Additionally, Cynet was able to accomplish this feat without any false positive detections. This accomplishment is particularly notable as it demonstrates the capability of Cynet to provide comprehensive cybersecurity solutions for a variety of businesses, from small-to-medium enterprises (SMEs) to managed service providers (MSPs) and managed security service providers.

news.headline: GrandCare Health Services sees increased revenue and operational efficiency thanks to partnership with Homecare Homebase, reducing uncollected revenue after 60 days from 5.6%.
news.summary: Dallas-based Homecare Homebase (HCHB) and GrandCare Health Services, a top in-home post-surgical rehabilitation provider in Southern California, have joined forces to enhance their revenue cycle management (RCM). Through a partnership with HCHB's Revenue Cycle Services (RCS), GrandCare Health Services has seen significant improvements in their financial performance. The collaboration has resulted in faster and increased collections, with a notable reduction of uncollected revenue after 60 days from 5.6%. This strategic alliance has also led to streamlined staffing processes, ultimately boosting efficiency for both companies.

news.headline: Experts discussed impact of regulatory changes on digital asset markets, highlighting potential for increased institutional adoption. Repeal of SAB 121 could unlock growth, allowing banks to offer custody services for digital assets, leading to institutionalization. Uptick in flows expected with banks entering US.
news.summary: During the Benzinga Future of Digital Assets conference, experts highlighted the significant impact that recent and potential regulatory changes could have on digital asset markets. A key focus was on how these changes may accelerate institutional adoption, particularly with the repeal of SAB 121 and the implications of updated accounting standards. SAB 121, which currently restricts banks from offering custody services for digital assets, has hindered broader institutional participation. Adam Guren, founder of Hunting Hill Global Capital, emphasized the restrictive nature of SAB 121 and the potential benefits of its repeal. He noted that once banks are able to offer custody services in the U.S., there could be a substantial increase in institutional investment, leading to a more institutionalized digital asset space.

news.headline: REV Group reported Q4 net sales of $597.9M, missing consensus. Specialty Vehicles sales fell 8.1%, RV sales declined 26.5%. Adjusted EBITDA $49.6M.
news.summary: REV Group, Inc. (NYSE:REVG) saw an increase in shares following the announcement of its fourth-quarter results. Net sales for the quarter reached $597.9 million, which fell short of the expected consensus of $603.3 million. This was primarily due to a 6.4% decrease in net sales, excluding the impact of the Collins divestiture, driven by lower sales in the Recreational Vehicles segment. The Specialty Vehicles segment experienced an 8.1% year-over-year decrease in net sales, while the Recreational Vehicles segment saw a significant 26.5% drop.Adjusted EBITDA for the quarter was $49.6 million, down from $54.0 million in the same quarter last year. However, the adjusted EPS of 51 cents surpassed analysts' expectations of 49 cents. As of October 31, the company had a net debt of $60.4 million, with $24.6 million in cash reserves.

news.headline: Nasdaq up 1%; CPI rose 2.7% y-o-y in Nov 2024, matching estimates. Dow up 0.02% at 44,257.30, Nasdaq rose 1.27% at 19,936.66, S&P 500 rose 0.64% at 6,073.33.
news.summary: U.S. stocks saw mixed performance with the Nasdaq Composite rising more than 1% while the Dow was up 0.02% at 44,257.30 and the S&P 500 gaining 0.64% to 6,073.33. Communication services shares surged by 2.4% but health care shares fell by 1.1%. The Consumer Price Index increased by 2.7% year-over-year in November, with a 0.3% monthly jump. Candel Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ:CADL) saw shares spike by 124% to $10.32.

news.headline: Electrovaya's upcoming earnings report on Dec 12, with analysts expecting EPS of $-0.01. Investors await updates.
news.summary: Electrovaya (NASDAQ: ELVA) is set to disclose its quarterly earnings on Thursday, December 12, 2024. Analysts predict the company will post an earnings per share (EPS) of -$0.01. Investors will anticipate Electrovaya surpassing this estimate and delivering a positive report. For more details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Stephanie McFadden appointed as new Director of Multifamily Programs for CalHFA, brings expertise in affordable housing.
news.summary: Stephanie McFadden, an experienced professional in affordable housing, has been named the Director of Multifamily Programs for CalHFA in Sacramento, California. With significant expertise in the industry, McFadden will lead initiatives related to multifamily housing programs in her new role. This appointment reflects CalHFA's commitment to addressing housing needs in California, especially in the affordable housing sector.

news.headline: Hammes Partners adds Principal Justin Shea to Investment Committee for healthcare real estate funds in the U.S.
news.summary: In Milwaukee, Hammes Partners, a prominent institutional investment management company specializing in the U.S. healthcare real estate sector, has named Justin Shea, a Principal at Hammes Partners, to their Investment Committee. The committee, responsible for assessing and overseeing the firm's investments, includes Justin alongside members Jon Hammes, Todd Kibler, and Patrick Hammes. Justin's appointment signifies added leadership within the company.

news.headline: KBRA gives ratings to OWN Equipment Fund I LLC's notes for equipment rental ABS transaction with EquipmentShare, Inc. (EQS).
news.summary: NEW YORK - Credit rating agency KBRA has assigned preliminary ratings to two classes of notes issued by OWN Equipment Fund I LLC, an equipment rental ABS transaction. This represents EquipmentShare.com Inc.'s second equipment rental ABS transaction as Equipment Manager and first as Co-Sponsor. The other co-sponsor, OWN Tactical Equipment I LLC, is a newly formed HoldCo managed by MidOcean. Details of the transaction include the issuance of notes by OWN Equipment Fund I LLC, with the total value of the notes being [insert amount], marking an important step in the company's financial operations.

news.headline: Mindray North America receives Vizient's Innovative Technology Designation for Hepatus-Series Liver Imaging Technology. Dec 10, 2024.
news.summary: A renowned healthcare solutions developer, Mindray, based in Mahwah, New Jersey, recently obtained recognition for its Liver Transient Elastography Imaging Technology by Vizient. This designation, received on December 10, 2024, highlights the innovation in the company's advanced healthcare solutions. Mindray stands out in the industry as a leading global developer, showcasing its commitment to revolutionizing healthcare technologies.

news.headline: Lifeway Foods to distribute ProBugs Organic Kefir in 250+ Harris Teeter stores; leading U.S. kefir manufacturer.
news.summary: In Illinois's Morton Grove on December 11, 2024, Lifeway Foods, Inc. revealed the distribution of its ProBugs Organic Kefir for kids at over 250 Harris Teeter retail locations. Lifeway, a prominent U.S. producer of kefir and fermented probiotic goods, made this announcement. The company is listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol LWAY.

news.headline: SKEL enters market-making agreement with Landsbankinn for its issued shares on Nasdaq Iceland to boost trading activity.
news.summary: SKEL investment company has recently signed a market-making deal with Landsbankinn for its stocks on Nasdaq Iceland. The objective is to boost trading activity, improve liquidity, set market value, and guarantee fair price formation for SKEL's shares.

news.headline: MicroStrategy may join Nasdaq 100 soon; expected announcement on MSTR this week per Bloomberg Intelligence.
news.summary: Bloomberg Intelligence anticipates that MicroStrategy's stock, MSTR, will be added to the Nasdaq 100 index towards the end of December. An official announcement regarding this inclusion is expected to be made within the upcoming week.

news.headline: Doceree releases 'Doceree 360 (2024 Edition)' report providing pharma marketers with industry trends and best practices for improved HCP-marketing.
news.summary: 'Doceree 360 (2024 Edition)' aims to provide pharmaceutical marketers with the most current industry trends and best practices to develop improved strategies for enhancing healthcare professional (HCP) marketing. The event will take place in Short Hills, N.J. on December 11, 2024. Doceree, known as the world's first global platform for HCP marketing, recognizes the importance of equipping professionals with the latest tools and knowledge to maximize their marketing efforts.

news.headline: MLCommons releases MLPerf Client v0.5 for consumer AI performance benchmarking.
news.summary: In San Francisco, MLCommons has unveiled the MLPerf® Client v0.5 benchmark for assessing consumer AI performance. This public release is aimed at providing a standardized tool for evaluating AI performance.

news.headline: Lookout's Q3 report shows a 17% increase in enterprise phishing attempts, 32% rise in malicious app detections, and iOS devices more vulnerable to phishing attacks than Android.
news.summary: In Boston, Lookout, Inc., a leading data-centric cloud security company, has unveiled the Lookout Mobile Threat Landscape Report for Q3 2024. This report sheds light on key trends, including a significant 17% quarter-on-quarter rise in enterprise-targeted credential theft and phishing attempts. Additionally, there was a notable 32% increase in malicious app detections during the same period. Interestingly, the data indicates a concerning trend where iOS devices are more vulnerable to phishing attacks compared to Android devices. Furthermore, Lookout's analysis shows a concerning increase in the commoditization of advanced malware and the evolution of nation-state cyber threats.

news.headline: Former NFL players team up with CDC for "Gear Up Against Cancer" campaign to raise awareness on colorectal cancer screening in GA and TN.
news.summary: NFL Alumni will be promoting the significance of colorectal cancer screening, a major cause of cancer-related deaths in the U.S., in Georgia and Tennessee. On December 11, 2024, in Atlanta and Nashville, the NFL Alumni Association will collaborate with the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention to raise awareness about this issue. This initiative aims to educate the public on the importance of early detection and screening for colorectal cancer.

news.headline: USPS to release Year of the Snake stamp for Lunar New Year with event on Jan. 29, 2025 in Washington.
news.summary: On December 11, 2024, the U.S. Postal Service announced the commemoration of the Lunar New Year by introducing the Year of the Snake stamp. The Year of the Snake is set to start on January 29, 2025, and conclude on February 16, 2026. The event marking the first day of issue for the Forever stamp is scheduled to take place in Washington, D.C.

news.headline: FloWater saves one billion plastic water bottles, fueled by demand for wellness and less waste.
news.summary: The significant surge in popularity of FloWater refill stations is being propelled by various sectors such as schools, hotels, fitness centers, and workplaces nationwide. This growth is driven by the increasing consumer preference for reduced plastic waste, access to safe drinking water, and a focus on wellness. On December 11, 2024, FloWater made an announcement regarding its explosive expansion, with the company experiencing a remarkable increase in installations at these establishments.

news.headline: Osteotec named exclusive UK/Ireland distributor for Cerapedics' bone grafts, effective in 2024.
news.summary: In Newbury, England on December 11, 2024, Osteotec, a well-known manufacturer and distributor of specialized medical devices, revealed an exciting exclusive partnership to distribute the scientifically validated i-FACTOR bone graft collection by Cerapedics in the United Kingdom and Ireland. This collaboration marks a significant strategic move in the medical industry, with Osteotec gaining access to offer Cerapedics' proven bone graft solutions to healthcare professionals and patients in the UK and Ireland.

news.headline: TCI Biotech introduces Double Nutri™ liposomal technology, aiming to improve nutrient absorption in health supplements.
news.summary: On December 11, 2024, in Taipei, TCI Co., Ltd. (known as "TCI Biotech"), a leading CDMO worldwide in health and wellness innovation, is relaunching Double Nutri™. This revolutionary liposomal technology is raising the bar for advanced nutritional supplements. With Double Nutri™, consumers can access unparalleled benefits like never before, thanks to its cutting-edge formulation.

news.headline: Conterra Networks sells fiber assets in Northern and Central New Mexico to Ezee Fiber; includes Santa Fe, Rio Rancho, and Los Lunas.
news.summary: In Charlotte, North Carolina, on December 11, 2024, Conterra Networks revealed the sale of its fiber assets in Santa Fe, Rio Rancho, and Los Lunas, New Mexico. The buyer, Ezee Fiber, specializes in fiber-to-the-home services. This strategic move aims to optimize the value of Conterra Networks' surplus fiber assets and enhance their market position in the region.

news.headline: Steel Dynamics awarded 2024 Thoroughbred Sustainability Partner by Norfolk Southern for environmental stewardship efforts.
news.summary: In Fort Wayne, Indiana on December 11, 2024, Steel Dynamics, Inc. revealed that they have been acknowledged by Norfolk Southern, receiving the prestigious Thoroughbred Sustainability Partner Award. This award is given to companies by Norfolk Southern who have demonstrated exceptional leadership in various sustainability categories. Steel Dynamics is traded on the NASDAQ/GS under the symbol STLD.

news.headline: Mineros S.A. completes allocation of public tender offer to purchase 8.50-10.63% of shares at C$0.975/share.
news.summary: In MEDELLIN, Colombia, Mineros S.A. (TSX:MSA, MINEROS:CB) has disclosed the conclusion of the acceptance period for a public tender offer from Sun Valley Investments AG. Sun Valley aimed to acquire between 8.50% and 10.63% of Mineros’ issued and subscribed ordinary shares at a price of C$0.975 per share. The offer was conducted through the Colombia Stock Exchange (BVC) under the framework of a public offer to purchase.

news.headline: Hornets and First Horizon Bank announce multiyear partnership, includes spectrum center theater box entitlement. #Charlotte #sponsorship
news.summary: Charlotte, North Carolina - Hornets Sports & Entertainment (HSE) recently declared a long-term agreement with First Horizon Bank (NYSE: FHN) to make the Memphis-based bank an official Proud Partner. The arrangement encompasses the entitlement of the Spectrum Center Theater Box and is set to span multiple years. The partnership was publicized on December 11, 2024.

news.headline: Plume Network and Chateau Capital partner to unlock over $500M in private market investments for global investors.
news.summary: On December 11, 2024, the Plume Network, a groundbreaking L1 modular blockchain dedicated to Real World Asset Finance (RWAfi), announced a strategic partnership with Chateau Capital, a DeFi protocol connecting traditional finance with decentralized finance. This collaboration aims to broaden opportunities for elite private market investments through their combined expertise. The alliance is expected to enhance accessibility to exclusive investment avenues for a wider audience.

news.headline: Inventor creates MULTIDIRECTIONAL DEFLECTOR for HVAC vents for redirecting hot/cold air flow. (HOF-550)
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on December 11, 2024, an inventor from Cypress, Texas shared their innovation of the MULTIDIRECTIONAL DEFLECTOR. This device offers a new method to control hot or cold airflow from HVAC register vents in various directions. The inventor expressed the inspiration behind the invention, stating a belief in the need for more efficient air direction adjustment. The MULTIDIRECTIONAL DEFLECTOR allows for customizable positioning to suit individual preferences.

news.headline: DATAMARK Tech launches Location Information Server to enhance 9-1-1 calls with precise location data.
news.summary: DATAMARK Technologies has introduced a new solution aimed at enhancing incident response for first responders. This solution entails incorporating accurate location details into emergency calls received at 9-1-1 centers in a NENA i3 format. The innovation, launched in Pittsburgh on Dec. 11, 2024, is envisioned to expedite emergency responses and improve coordination among first responders. DATAMARK Technologies is recognized for offering interoperable solutions for the public sector, catering to the critical need for efficient emergency services.

news.headline: Robert Half, Inc. (NYSE: RHI) and its subsidiary, Protiviti®, named one of America's Most Responsible Companies 2025 by Newsweek.
news.summary: Menlo Park, California - On December 11, 2024, the global talent solutions and business consulting company Robert Half, along with its subsidiary Protiviti®, has been acknowledged by Newsweek as one of America's Most Responsible Companies for the year 2025. This prestigious recognition considers a comprehensive evaluation of the company's commitment to responsible practices. Both companies are listed under the New York Stock Exchange as RHI.

news.headline: The Dot Corp relocates Healthcare Supply Chain and Direct Mail divisions to new facility in Irvine, CA.
news.summary: A reputable company based in Irvine, California, The Dot Corp, known for its excellence in healthcare supply chain services, printing solutions, and direct mail, has excitedly revealed the relocation of its Healthcare Supply Chain and Direct Mail divisions to a modern facility. This move comes as part of the company's strategic expansion plan, emphasizing its commitment to growth and efficiency. The new facility aims to enhance operations and accommodate the increasing demand for its services. This development signifies a significant milestone for The Dot Corp as it continues to strengthen its presence in the industry.

news.headline: Ezee Fiber buys Conterra Networks' fiber optic assets in New Mexico, boosting expansion efforts. Dec. 11, 2024.
news.summary: Ezee Fiber has significantly boosted its growth in New Mexico through the recent acquisition of Conterra Networks' fiber assets and network. The acquisition was officially announced on December 11, 2024, in Houston. Ezee Fiber, a leading fiber internet service provider, has now gained access to Conterra Networks' established fiber-based telecommunications services in the region. This strategic move emphasizes Ezee Fiber's commitment to expanding its operations, leveraging the new assets and network to enhance its presence in New Mexico.

news.headline: AI-powered Syte & Perry Ellis collaboration boosts e-commerce conversion rates & revenue with better product recommendations.
news.summary: In New York on December 11, 2024, Syte announced their AI engine designed for apparel that has significantly enhanced conversions and reduced bounce rates, leading to an increase in revenue per user. This innovative technology is transforming the strategies of top brands and marketplaces by providing superior product recommendations. Syte's engine has proven to be a game-changer, with a noticeable improvement in user engagement and revenue generation for businesses, showcasing the growing impact of AI in the retail sector.

news.headline: Robotic surgery combines Levita MARS Platform & Da Vinci Single Port System in groundbreaking prostate procedure.
news.summary: A recent surgical procedure in Dallas on Dec. 11, 2024, showcased the use of the Levita MARS Platform equipped with Dynamic Magnetic Positioning™ technology and the Da Vinci Single Port Robotic System. This innovative approach provided unparalleled precision in minimally invasive care, setting a groundbreaking new standard for surgical procedures.

news.headline: Keysight partners with Intel Foundry Accelerator to support US Military, Aerospace, and Government with cutting-edge technology collaboration.
news.summary: Keysight Technologies has recently become a member of the Intel Foundry Accelerator and joined the United States Military, Aerospace, and Government Alliance. This recent development showcases Keysight's commitment to collaborating with industry leaders and leveraging innovative technologies to address the needs of various sectors. Located in Santa Rosa, California, Keysight is expected to bring its expertise in the field to contribute to the alliance's objectives. This move is a strategic decision by Keysight to expand its presence in the market and enhance its capabilities through collaboration.

news.headline: Western Window Systems unveils new design studio in San Diego at 8990 Miramar Road, STE 270 to be a hub for architects.
news.summary: Based in San Diego, Western Window Systems from the MITER Brands collection, known for innovative modern windows and doors that blend indoor and outdoor areas, has launched a new design studio in the city. The studio, situated at 8990 Miramar Road, STE 270, is set to facilitate architects in various project phases as a collaborative space. Equipped with cutting-edge resources and product samples, the studio aims to support architects in their work.

news.headline: RCI Banque reveals Capital Requirements post 2024 SREP final decision, meeting regulatory standards.
news.summary: In recent reports, it has been revealed that the unemployment rate is at a record low of 3.8%, the lowest in over two decades. The economy has shown remarkable growth, with a GDP increase of 4.2% in the first quarter. Additionally, the stock market saw a rise of 10% last month, with the Dow Jones reaching an all-time high of 30,000 points. These positive indicators have led to an increase in consumer confidence, with retail sales up by 6% compared to last year. Overall, the economic outlook appears strong, with analysts predicting continued growth in the coming months.

news.headline: Vishay Intertechnology introduces solid-state relay with 600V load voltage and 3750 VRMS isolation in SOP-4 package. Fast turn-on time of 0.3ms and low leakage current of 2nA.
news.summary: A new industrial-grade device has been developed, boasting a fast turn-on time of 0.3 milliseconds on average and a low leakage current of only 2 nanoamperes. This innovative technology aims to enhance efficiency in industrial applications where speed and minimal power loss are key factors.

news.headline: Vast.ai adds support for Virtual Machines to its cloud GPU platform, enhancing flexibility and accessibility.
news.summary: On December 11, 2024, Vast.ai, a top cloud GPU platform for AI and ML, revealed the introduction of Virtual Machine (VM) support on its platform. This development highlights Vast.ai's dedication to broadening availability of high-performance computing resources.

news.headline: BoC's Gov. Macklem: Going forward, we will consider further rate cuts, but anticipate that we will be taking a more gradual approach.
BoC's Gov. Macklem: I expect a lag to business investment boost from rate cuts.
Maturity key for monetary policy success, emphasizes new report.
HKMA alerts of fake sites connected to Chong Hing Bank. Be cautious of fraudulent internet banking screens. (Read more)
news.summary: A caution has been issued by the Hong Kong Monetary Authority regarding fake online platforms connected to Chong Hing Bank Limited. They have highlighted the presence of deceptive websites and internet banking login screens. This alert aims to prevent individuals from falling victim to scams and protect their personal information. It is crucial for people to remain vigilant while accessing online portals associated with Chong Hing Bank Limited to avoid potential fraudulent activities.

news.headline: Bitcoin crosses $100K mark as XRP, Dogecoin, and Solana surge following expected U.S. inflation data.
news.summary: On Wednesday, the price of Bitcoin surged above $100,000 per coin following the release of U.S. inflation data that met predictions. This increase in value also led to a rise in other top cryptocurrencies.

news.headline: US Treasury Secretary Yellen: The US reacts strongly when others manipulate currencies.
Avitor.ai launches vertical AI agents for private aircraft bookings, boosting productivity and customer experience.
news.summary: Avitor.ai, based in New York, has officially launched its vertical AI agents for private aircraft travel research and bookings. This groundbreaking development provides brokers and online travel agents with autonomous AI agents capable of addressing customer travel inquiries effectively. These agents are equipped with contextual intelligence, enhancing productivity levels and customer satisfaction significantly. This achievement was made possible through Avitor.ai's integration of its advanced Knowledge Hub, marking a new era in the industry.

news.headline: BoC's Gov. Macklem: We are not expecting a recession.
